data.name: 情色地下城Plus
data.detailed_description:
女孩們回來了！
她們破解了最難的迷宮之謎，獲得情色大師的稱號。
然而在華麗名聲的背後，女孩們卻在聲色場所大肆揮霍，欠下巨額債務。

就在她們好不容易償清時，鐵匠的女兒赫梅蒂亞出現在她們面前。
赫梅蒂亞獲得了最新發現的迷宮抽籤資格，然而這對剛成為冒險者的人來說是高難度的挑戰。

於是她便向地下城情色大師們提議潛入迷宮。
女孩們的冒險就此展開。

和美麗的戰士們一起
拿著地圖
探索地下城
透過指令戰鬥
和重生的女孩們
和戰士們一起變強吧！
累積無數的經驗
面對強大的敵人！
來，一起出發冒險去吧！



她沒有媽媽，因此她十分珍視有如家人般的村人們。師父莫里希莫似乎已超過60歲了，就連村長薩恩也認為她相當長壽，然而本人絕口不提年紀。炎之一族似乎有個秘密，但由於和主劇情關係密切，所以先保密！


赫梅蒂亞的正字標記是安全帽，是從古代遺跡發現的機車安全帽再加上頭盔的部分零件所組成。在打鐵店日積月累訓練出的肌肉和體力讓她成為和多妮莉亞不相上下的攻擊者，同時也是位活躍於戰場、深受信賴的戰士。


某天，瑪麗安妮和前來消費的傭兵客人發生爭執，打贏了對方，聽到傳聞的摩爾蓋亞王發現了她的存在，於是相中她成為王國騎士團的一員。目前瑪麗安妮已退出騎士團，成為每天潛伏於迷宮的冒險者。


她其實有位雙胞胎妹妹，身為孤兒的姐妹倆為了尋找自己的身世而到處旅行。兩人在魔導國家提切伊納停留時，妹妹找到了王國魔導士的工作，兩人就此分道揚鑣。


當時她也受了一定的教育，待遇也變好了，但她的內心總是烏雲密佈。某天，傭兵王摩爾蓋亞王派遣了兩位仍是新手但實力驚人的王國騎士和多妮莉亞對戰，卻被多妮莉亞打敗了。傭兵王便相中了她，懇求她加入騎士團。



本遊戲為模擬3D地下城・動畫RPG。
隨時顯示自動MAP＆迷你地圖，
不擅長遊玩地下城遊戲的玩家也能放心遊玩。

破解所需時間預估為12小時左右。


  • 使用遊戲控制器也能順暢遊玩。

Rusimaru堂為本遊戲的授權公司，如對本產品有任何疑問，請洽Tensei Games。
在購買本產品前，請務必先遊玩試玩版，確認您所居住的地區是否能以PC正常啟動遊戲。

data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Dungeon of Erotic Master Plus
data.detailed_description:
They're back!
The girls hailed as the Erotic Masters after solving the mystery behind the world's toughest dungeon are now living legends!
But behind the accolades and fame, they blew all their money and ended up deep in debt.

Sometime later, after they finally paid off their debts, a blacksmith's daughter named Hermetia came to visit them.
She had been randomly selected to be allowed to explore a newly discovered dungeon, but it was too difficult for a novice.

That's when she came to the DunEro Masters with a proposal:
Will they explore the dungeon with her?

Explore the dungeons and acquire maps with these beautiful warriors.
Grow stronger in battle alongside all-new girls.
Gain lots of experience and face powerful enemies!
It's time to set off on your adventure!



She grew up without a mother and sees her entire village as her family. Her master, Morissimo, is over 60 years old while the village chief San is even older. Although Martina's lifespan is longer than a normal human, she refuses to discuss her age. The Fire Tribe seemingly has a few secrets, and those will be uncovered throughout this story.


After finding what looks like a bike helmet with a symbol in an ancient ruin, she has spent every day attaching armor to it and enhancing it in the smith. Her muscles and stamina make her as powerful an attacker as Donelia and a reliable ally in battle.


This rumor started spreading after she got into a fight with a mercenary and won one day. She was discovered by King Morgaia and joined the Royal Knights, but she has since left them and now spends her days as a dungeon-crawling adventurer.


She has a twin sister. While traveling in search of information about their birth and why they were orphaned, they passed through the Magical Kingdom of Tychlluina where her sister became one of the Royal Mages.


During that time, she gained a certain degree of cultural knowledge as well as an improved salary, but the darkness in her heart remained. One day, Mercenary King Morgaia sent two powerful but inexperienced Royal Knights to fight Donelia, but she defeated them. That's how the Mercenary King came to ask Donelia to join the knights.


This is a pseudo-3D dungeon/animation RPG.
Fun even for players who struggle with dungeon crawlers.
The automap and mini-map are displayed at all times.

Estimated clear time: 12 hours


  • Playable using a game pad.

*Before purchasing this product, we highly recommend that you play the demo [Japanese only] to check if the game works properly on your computer in your region.
*Rushimarudo is the licensor of this game. For inquiries about the product, please contact Tensei Games.

data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
